title: Villager Leads
description:
Use leads on villagers!

Take them with you, wherever you want to go.
body:
# Villager Leads Mod

This mod allows you to use leads on villagers and wandering traders by overriding the AbstractVillager class. The canBeLeashed method returns true, enabling you to attach leads to villagers and move them anywhere you like.

## v2.1.0: Configs and More

- updated: added config file, you can select which mobs can be lead, 0 = false, 1 = true
- new: optional leads for bats, turtles and zombie villagers, use config to enable leads for them

![config file](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bb300808384474ba47a0f18cd21e4830015de54.png)

## Mod Pack Permission Granted:
You may use this mod, or any of my mods in your modpacks.

## Discord Server
[Join the discord server](https://discord.gg/9UVGJGyqbv) to report bugs or to make suggestions.
